patch.value: CONTEXT: pm must serve both solo/lightweight and team-enforced workflows; exposing every knob is overwhelming. DECISION: three built-in presets plus a custom escape hatch, each setting ownership_enforcement/create_mode/close_validation/parent_reference/metadata_profile/stale-lock force. CONSEQUENCES: simple onboarding (pick a preset); enterprise enforcement available; presets do not cover domain archetypes (handled separately via type presets, see pm-1lkm). EVIDENCE: src/core/shared/constants.ts GOVERNANCE_PRESET_DEFAULTS, src/cli/commands/init.ts; item pm-7by2.
ADR: Governance presets (minimal/default/strict/custom) as the primary config surface
Governance presets (minimal/default/strict/custom) as the primary config surface
ADR recorded and accepted; architectural decision documented as durable context on 2026-05-31.
Accepted ADR recorded in living map
The ADR captures a durable architecture or operating decision with context, consequences, and evidence for future agents.
The closed Decision 'ADR: Governance presets (minimal/default/strict/custom) as the primary config surface' is recorded under the ADR living log and preserved as durable project context.
